name: @intentsolutionsio/market-movers-scanner
description: Scan for top market movers - gainers, losers, volume spikes, and unusual activity

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install market-movers-scanner\\n  or /plugin install market-movers-scanner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
